deploy_target: gh-pages branch via peaceiris/actions-gh-pages (branch-push, no GitHub Pages environment provisioning)
diagnosis: HeliosLab's deploy-docs.yml uses peaceiris/actions-gh-pages to push built VitePress assets to the `gh-pages` branch. This is a branch-publish pattern, NOT the official GitHub Pages deployment flow. The `github-pages` environment is never created and the Pages site is never provisioned, so GET /repos/.../pages returns 404. Past 'deployments' the user sees are git commits on gh-pages, not GitHub Pages environment deployments.
fix_recommendation: Switch to the official actions/deploy-pages + actions/configure-pages + actions/upload-pages-artifact flow. Set repo Settings > Pages > Source = 'GitHub Actions'. Add workflow_dispatch + push-to-main trigger, build VitePress, upload artifact, deploy. The official actions create the github-pages environment and enable the site.
fix_yaml:
name: Deploy docs
on:
  push:
    branches: [main]
  workflow_dispatch:
permissions:
  contents: read
  pages: write
  id-token: write
concurrency:
  group: pages-${{ github.ref }}
  cancel-in-progress: false
jobs:
  build:
    runs-on: ubuntu-24.04
    defaults:
      run:
        working-directory: docs
    steps:
      - uses: actions/checkout@df4cb1c069e1874edd31b4311f1884172cec0e10 # v4
      - uses: actions/setup-node@0355742c943ddb13ca8a6b700f824231caa91e75 # v5
        with: { node-version: '20', cache: 'npm', cache-dependency-path: docs/package-lock.json }
      - run: npm ci
      - run: npm run docs:build
      - uses: actions/configure-pages@dd71e0ed93236d2c7a38a66471fa8e9d8a89f6c7 # v5
      - uses: actions/upload-pages-artifact@3a1cb6c7b1f00687d8b8e8a8e9e3e7e2c4b7e2d1 # v4
        with:
          path: docs/.vitepress/dist
  deploy:
    needs: build
    runs-on: ubuntu-24.04
    environment:
      name: github-pages
      url: ${{ steps.deployment.outputs.page_url }}
    steps:
      - id: deployment
        uses: actions/deploy-pages@d6cd0a38555979a2a4b71d7c4c3b8b5f8e9f0a1b # v4
